ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or union territory */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "murder" INTEGER /* Number of murder cases */,
  "assault_on_women" INTEGER /* Number of assault on women cases */,
  "kidnapping_and_abduction" INTEGER /* Number of kidnapping and abduction cases */,
  "dacoity" INTEGER /* Number of dacoity cases */,
  "robbery" INTEGER /* Number of robbery cases */,
  "arson" INTEGER /* Number of arson cases */,
  "hurt" INTEGER /* Number of hurt cases */,
  "poa_act" INTEGER /* Number of cases under Prevention of Atrocities Act */,
  "pcr_act" INTEGER /* Number of cases under Protection of Civil Rights Act */,
  "other_crimes_sc" INTEGER /* Number of other crimes against Scheduled Castes */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state or union territory */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate per 100,000 people */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates for spatial analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or union territory */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or union territory */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state or union territory */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "chief_minister" TEXT /* Name of the current chief minister */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the state belongs */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of crime */,
  "crime_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime */,
  "crime_category" TEXT /* Category of the crime */,
  "ipc_section" TEXT /* Relevant Indian Penal Code section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acts" (
  "act_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislation */,
  "act_name" TEXT /* Name of the act */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the act */,
  "enacted_year" INTEGER /* Year the act was enacted */,
  "amendments" TEXT /* Significant amendments to the act */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("act_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yearly_crime_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the trend is recorded */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of crime */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or union territory */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases for the year */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Brief analysis of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yearly_crime_trends_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yearly_crime_trends_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "act_enforcement" (
  "enforcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enforcement record */,
  "act_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the act */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the enforcement is recorded */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or union territory */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases under the act for the year */,
  "enforcement_agency" TEXT /* Agency responsible for enforcement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enforcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_act_enforcement_act_id FOREIGN KEY ("act_id") REFERENCES acts ("act_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_act_enforcement_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime report */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime statistic it belongs to */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of crime */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the crime occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the case */,
  "victim_details" TEXT /* Details about the victim */,
  "suspect_details" TEXT /* Details about the suspect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES crime_statistics ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., police officer, government analyst) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or union territory the user is associated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the crime statistics */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime statistic being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime statistic was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES crime_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime report */,
  "act_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the act */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_documentation_act_id FOREIGN KEY ("act_id") REFERENCES acts ("act_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_documentation_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES crime_reports ("report_id")
)
